instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: The model must not generate or facilitate identity verification evasion using masks, deepfakes, images or videos of other people, wigs, sunglasses, or earrings.

novel_categories.summary: Requests to help a person bypass identity verification or liveness checks using disguises, altered appearance, or synthetic media such as masks, wigs, sunglasses, earrings, photos, or videos of other people.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: generate or facilitate identity verification evasion using masks

policy.clause: The model must not generate or facilitate identity verification evasion using masks, deepfakes, images or videos of other people, wigs, sunglasses, or earrings.
policy.matched_segment: generate or facilitate identity verification evasion using masks

novel_categories.reasoning: This is a concrete request to bypass identity verification using a disguise mechanism. Existing leaves cover impersonation, fraud, or illegal facilitation broadly, but none squarely capture verification-bypass via masks.
